reference: Dear Doctor, I appreciate your help. I did a prolactin level test once early in the morning, and it was twenty-five. I repeated it after one week, having been awake for more than three hours, and it was forty-six. My Anti-Müllerian Hormone level is two point two, and I am trying to get pregnant. Do you think it is my prolactin level that is preventing me from conceiving?
text: Dear Doctor, I appreciate your help. I did a prolactin level test once early in the morning and it was 25. I repeated it after one week, having been awake for more than three hours, and it was 46. My anti-malarian hormone level is 2.2 and I am trying to get pregnant. Do you think it is my prolactin level that is preventing me from conceiving?
